name: highlight_objects
full_help:
highlight_objects

Description: 
Highlight objects in different colors

Syntax: 
highlight_objects  [-color_index <arg>] [-rgb <args>] [-color <arg>]
                   [-leaf_cells] [-quiet] [-verbose] <objects>

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-color_index]  Color index
  [-rgb]          RGB color index list
  [-color]        Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and 
                  orange
  [-leaf_cells]   Leaf cells
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  <objects>       Objects to highlight

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and orange
Suspend message limits during command execution
